subtasks.description: Evaluate the developer's production database access request against security and access control policies. Determine if live debugging access to production is permitted, what conditions must be met, and whether approval is required.

plan.cost_rationale: This query explicitly involves a governance/access control decision: a developer requesting production database access. The policy_action specialist is needed to evaluate the request against the organization's access policies and determine compliance. Mid tier (Sonnet) is assigned because policy evaluation typically requires reasoning about multiple policy rules, exceptions, approval workflows, and conditional criteria—beyond a simple single-rule check. One subtask is sufficient because the entire access control evaluation is a single coherent policy decision."

output.reason: dev-alice does not hold the on-call role and has not obtained Manager approval, violating POL-401. Additionally, POL-402 explicitly restricts debug access to the designated staging environment, prohibiting live debugging against prod-mysql-primary.
applied_constraints: Manager approval is required before any production database access can be granted
User must hold the on-call role at the time of access per POL-401
Debug activity must be redirected to the designated staging environment per POL-402
Access to prod-mysql-primary is denied until both POL-401 conditions are satisfied
